The 2026 AFC U-20 Women's Asian Cup takes place in Thailand between 1-18 April.
The biennial international youth football championship is organised by the Asian Football Confederation (AFC) for the women's under-20 national teams of Asia.

beIN SPORTS.desc_ar: The Qatari League is the official football league in Qatar. The league includes 12 teams. The most famous participating clubs are Al-Sadd, the champions of the last season; Al-Rayyan and Al-Arabi, the popular teams, Al-Duhail and Al-Gharafa, serious contenders for the title every season. The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verratti, and Qatari Akram Afif, the best player in Asia.

beIN SPORTS.desc_ar: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s  14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc_ar: Paris SG and Liverpool have met on six previous occasions in European competition, with both sides registering three wins each. Their most recent meetings came in the UEFA Champions League last season, where both won 1-0 away from home in the round of 16, before the Parisians won on a penalty shootout at Anfield to progress. In last season’s round of 16 tie between these two sides, Liverpool averaged just 38.6% possession and had 14 fewer shots on target than opponents Paris SG across the two legs ; their biggest negative shot on target differential in a UEFA Champions League knockout stage tie on record.

beIN 4K.original_title: Newcastle United vs. Sunderland - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.title_ar: نيوكاسل يونايتد ضد سندرلاند - الدوري الإنجليزي الممتاز 2026/2027
beIN 4K.title_en: Newcastle United vs. Sunderland - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.title_fr: Newcastle United contre Sunderland - Premier League anglaise 2026/2027
beIN 4K.desc_ar: Newcastle are winless in their last five home league games against Sunderland, with this their first such meeting at St James’ Park since a 1-1 draw in March 2016. Sunderland are unbeaten in their last 10 league games against Newcastle, winning seven of the last eight. It’s the joint-longest run either side has had without defeat in the history of the fixture.

beIN 4K.auto_generated_title: Brighton & Hove Albion vs Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.original_title: Brighton & Hove Albion vs. Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.title_ar: برايتون هوف ألبيون ضد.ليفربول - الدوري الإنجليزي الممتاز 2026/2027
beIN 4K.title_en: Brighton & Hove Albion vs. Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.title_fr: Brighton & Hove Albion contre Liverpool - Premier League anglaise 2026/2027
beIN 4K.desc_ar: Brighton have won two of their last three home league games against Liverpool, beating them 3-2 in this exact fixture last season. They’d only won one of their first 13 against the Reds. Following their 2-0 win at Anfield in December, Liverpool are looking to complete the league double over Brighton for the first time since 2019-20.

beIN 4K.auto_generated_title: A.F.C. Bournemouth vs Manchester United - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.original_title: A.F.C. Bournemouth vs. Manchester United - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.title_en: A.F.C. Bournemouth vs. Manchester United - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.desc_ar: Bournemouth are unbeaten in their last five Premier League games against Manchester United, scoring more goals in these five  than they did in their first 12 against the Red Devils in the division. Manchester United have lost just two of their eight away Premier League games against Bournemouth. Their last two visits to the Vitality Stadium have seen them come from behind to draw.
